Requires 'resource' parameter (caloriesIn, water) and 'period' parameter such as '1d', '7d', '30d', '1w', '1m', '3m', '6m', '1y' and optionally accepts 'date' parameter.

code.handler_resolution: server.tool(rangeToolName, rangeDescription, rangeParametersSchemaShape, handler); name/description constants at src/nutrition.ts:237-239

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_vulns

inputSchema.raw: inline zod/v4 inputSchema object in registerTool options

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_inspect

inputSchema.raw: inline zod/v4 inputSchema object in registerTool options

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_popular

metadata.name: hound_audit
metadata.description: Scan a project's lockfile for dependency risks. Parses package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml, requirements.txt, Cargo.lock, go.sum, or Gemfile.lock and batch-queries OSV for vulnerabilities across all dependencies.

inputSchema.raw: inline zod/v4 inputSchema object in registerTool options

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_audit

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_compare

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_preinstall

inputSchema.raw: inline zod/v4 inputSchema object in registerTool options

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_score

inputSchema.raw: inline zod/v4 inputSchema object in registerTool options

code.handler_resolution: register(server) calls server.registerTool for hound_upgrade

notes: This repo implements an HTTP bridge/runner for external MCP servers and clients; lib/server.js creates MCP clients and forwards calls but defines no concrete server-side tools.
index.ts creates an McpServer and registers seven UniFuncs tools with server.tool; supports stdio/SSE transports.
